name: EuiDatePickerRange
visualDescription: Two date/time input fields ("Start date" and "End date") placed side-by-side inside a single bordered form-control container, separated by an em-dash or arrow icon. Each field opens its own calendar popover when focused. NOT EuiSuperDatePicker (EuiDatePickerRange is a simple two-field date range without quick-select presets or a Refresh button).

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after children.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before children.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

delimiter.description:
The center content. Accepts a string to be wrapped in a subdued EuiText
or a single ReactElement

children.description: Including any children will replace all innards with the provided children

iconType.description: Pass either an icon type or set to `false` to remove icon entirely

iconSide.description: Define the side the icon should be displayed on. Applies only if `iconType` is defined as `IconType`.

isCustom.description: Won't apply any additional props to start and end date components

inline.description:
Displays both date picker calendars directly on the page.
Will not render `iconType`, `fullWidth`, `prepend`, or `append`.

Passes through to each control if `isCustom` is not set.

shadow.description: Allows turning the shadow off if using the `inline` prop

onBlur.description: Triggered whenever the start or end controls are blurred

onFocus.description: Triggered whenever the start or end controls are focused
